subcodes.first_line: It had been my earnest wish for you to stay in this region and to see to affairs related to the Holy Land. In particular, now that I am busy with the construction of the Shrine of the Báb
subcodes.subjects: @House of Worship [Mashriqu'l-Adhkar], @sacred remains; burial of the Bab, @growth of the Cause, @the Word of God; influence and centrality of, @Manifestation of God as sun
